simple_types.name: Frame_Rate
simple_types.code: type Frame_Rate is (FR_2FPS, FR_8FPS, FR_15FPS, FR_30FPS, FR_60FPS);

simple_types.name: Frame_Size
simple_types.code: type Frame_Size is (QQCIF, QQVGA, QQVGA2, QCIF, HQVGA, QVGA, CIF, VGA, …, UXGA);

simple_types.name: OV2640_Camera
simple_types.code: type OV2640_Camera (I2C : not null Any_I2C_Port) is private;

record_types.name: Resolution

subprograms.name: Enable_Auto_Band_Filter
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable_Auto_Band_Filter (This   : OV2640_Camera;
                                   Enable : Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Enable_Auto_Exposure_Control
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable_Auto_Exposure_Control (This   : OV2640_Camera;
                                        Enable : Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Enable_Auto_Gain_Control
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable_Auto_Gain_Control (This   : OV2640_Camera;
                                    Enable : Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Enable_Auto_White_Balance
subprograms.code:
procedure Enable_Auto_White_Balance (This   : OV2640_Camera;
                                     Enable : Boolean := True)

subprograms.name: Initialize
subprograms.code:
procedure Initialize (This : in out OV2640_Camera;
                      Addr : I2C_Address)
